vermouth_martini_bianco.label: Martini Bianco

wine_red_spatburgunder_rewe.label: REWE Beste Wahl Spätburgunder (Pinot Noir)

wine_sherry_lustau_fino.label: Emilio Lustau Fino Jarana
props: The benchmark for dry Sherry
Bone dry, salty, and intensely nutty (almonds)

wine_sherry_sandeman_medium_dry.label: Sandeman Sherry Medium Dry

props: Aged in American or French oak (Barrique)

wine_red_chianti_classico.label: Chianti Classico DOCG

wine_red_marques_de_riscal_reserva.label: Marqués de Riscal Rioja Reserva

wine_red_antinori_tignanello.label: Antinori Tignanello (Super Tuscan)

wine_red_casillero_del_diablo.label: Casillero del Diablo (Concha y Toro)

wine_red_knipser_cuvee_x.label: Knipser Cuvée X
props: One of Germany's top-tier red wine producers

wine_white_dr_loosen_riesling.label: Dr. Loosen Riesling (Blauschiefer)

wine_white_antinori_cervaro_della_sala.label: Antinori Cervaro della Sala (Premium Chardonnay)

wine_white_grauburgunder_rewe.label: REWE Beste Wahl Grauburgunder (Pinot Grigio Style)

wine_white_riesling_k_classic.label: K-Classic Riesling (Trocken)

wine_white_muller_thurgau_lidl.label: Vina de Sol Müller-Thurgau (Lidl)

wine_white_chardonnay_k_classic.label: K-Classic Chardonnay (Pays d'Oc)

wine_white_sauvignon_blanc_lidl.label: Cimarosa Sauvignon Blanc (Lidl)

whisky_scotch_highland_park_12.label: Highland Park 12 Years (Viking Honour)

Perfect balance of honey sweetness and aromatic peat smoke

whisky_scotch_glenfiddich_12.label: Glenfiddich 12 Years
props: The world's best-selling single malt
Aged in American oak and European sherry oak

whisky_scotch_laphroaig_10.label: Laphroaig 10 Years
props: The most polarizing 'medicinal' malt from the island of Islay

whisky_scotch_the_macallan_12.label: The Macallan 12 Years Double Cask

Intense sherry influence, notes of dried fruit and butterscotch

whisky_scotch_dalwhinnie_15.label: Dalwhinnie 15 Years
props: Known as 'The Gentle Dram' from Scotland's highest and coldest distillery

Notes of heather honey and a very delicate, clean finish

whisky_scotch_lagavulin_16.label: Lagavulin 16 Years
props: The 'King of Islay' - legendary for its intense, dried-fruit peat smoke
Slowest distillation process in Scotland, allowing maximum copper contact
Rich, salty, and sweet sherry-cask influence

whisky_scotch_talisker_10.label: Talisker 10 Years
props: 'Made by the Sea' - the only distillery on the Isle of Skye
Distinctive explosive peppery finish (the Talisker kick)

whisky_scotch_glenmorangie_10.label: Glenmorangie The Original (10 Years)

quality_metrics.distillation: Tallest copper stills in Scotland (Giraffe Stills)

props: Extremely fruity and floral due to very tall stills that only let light vapors pass
Aged in first-fill American oak for creamy vanilla notes

lang.ja: グレンモーレンジィ 10年

whisky_scotch_ardbeg_10.label: Ardbeg 10 Years (The Ultimate)
props: Untamed peat smoke mixed with a surprising citrus sweetness

whisky_scotch_oban_14.label: Oban 14 Years
props: A 'bridge' between the smoky islands and the fruity highlands
Subtle saltiness mixed with orange peel and honey notes

whiskey_irish_jameson.label: Jameson Irish Whiskey
props: Triple distillation makes it much smoother and less smoky than Scotch
Classic notes of vanilla and spicy wood

whisky_scotch_johnnie_walker_black.label: Johnnie Walker Black Label (12 Years)
props: A blend of approx. 40 different whiskies from across Scotland

whiskey_usa_jack_daniels_old_no7.label: Jack Daniel’s Old No. 7

whiskey_usa_jim_beam_white.label: Jim Beam White Label

High corn content in the mash (at least 51%)

spirit_vodka_absolut.label: Absolut Vodka

spirit_vodka_gorbatschow.label: Wodka Gorbatschow (Blau)

spirit_cachaca_pitu.label: Pitú (Cachaça)

spirit_vodka_smirnoff_red.label: Smirnoff No. 21

spirit_vodka_grey_goose.label: Grey Goose Vodka

spirit_vodka_belvedere.label: Belvedere Vodka

spirit_gin_bombay_sapphire.label: Bombay Sapphire London Dry Gin

spirit_gin_beefeater_london_dry.label: Beefeater London Dry Gin

spirit_gin_monkey_47.label: Monkey 47 Schwarzwald Dry Gin

spirit_rum_captain_morgan_spiced.label: Captain Morgan Spiced Gold

spirit_rum_myers_dark.label: Myers's Rum Original Dark

spirit_tequila_sierra_silver.label: Sierra Tequila Silver

spirit_tequila_patron_silver.label: Patrón Silver Tequila

liqueur_aperol.label: Aperol

liqueur_campari.label: Campari Bitter

liqueur_jaegermeister.label: Jägermeister

liqueur_fruit_chambord.label: Chambord Liqueur Royale

liqueur_fruit_peachtree.label: De Kuyper Peachtree

liqueur_herbal_chartreuse_verte.label: Chartreuse Verte (Grün)

liqueur_herbal_benedictine.label: Bénédictine D.O.M.

liqueur_coffee_kahlua.label: Kahlúa Coffee Liqueur

liqueur_vanilla_licor_43.label: Licor 43 (Cuarenta y Tres)

liqueur_cream_queen_margot.label: Queen Margot Irish Cream (Lidl)

liqueur_herbal_jagdstolz.label: Jagdstolz Kräuterlikör (REWE/ja!)

wine_red_merlot_casillero.label: Casillero del Diablo Merlot

wine_marsala_pellegrino_superiore.label: Marsala Superiore Dolce (Pellegrino)
